headline: Raymond James Maintains Outperform on Tractor Supply, Lowers Price Target to $40
summary: Raymond James  analyst Bobby Griffin   maintains Tractor Supply (NASDAQ:TSCO) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $48 to $40.
